name: MAMMARY DUCT ECTASIA
definition: PLASMA CELL MASTITIS = VARICOCELE TUMOR OF BREAST = MASTITIS OBLITERANS = rare aseptic inflammation of subareolar area

demographics.Mean age: 54 years; may develop in young children
demographics.Location: subareolar, often bilateral + symmetric; may be unilateral + focal

dominant_finding: dense triangular mass with apex toward nipple
distribution: subareolar, often bilateral + symmetric; may be unilateral + focal
discriminating_features: dense triangular mass with apex toward nipple
duct dilatation = distended ducts connecting to nipple

oval / elongated calcified ring around dilated ducts with very dense periphery (=
